title: node-sass@3.13.0 breaks build 🚨
body:
Hello lovely humans, [node-sass](https://www.npmjs.com/package/node-sass) just published its new version 3.13.0.
State Failing tests :rotating_light:
Dependency node-sass
New version 3.13.0
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build went from success to failure**. As node-sass is “only” a devDependency of this project it **might not break production or downstream projects**, but “only” your build or test tools – **preventing new deploys or publishes**. I recommend you give this issue a high priority. I’m sure you can resolve this :muscle: Of course this could just be a false positive, caused by a flaky test suite, or third parties that are currently broken or unavailable, but that would be another problem I’d recommend working on. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- [GitHub Release](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/releases/tag/v3.13.0)

In v3.12.x we made some change to how did logging. Namely we adopted npmlog, which is used by npm itself. This has caused a variety off issues we have not been able to reliably address. As such v3.13.0 undoes this change. Thanks too all the patient folks who helps up debug our logging issues.

Fixes

  • Use console.log and console.error for logging (@xzyfer)

Supported Environments

OS Architecture Node
Windows x86 & x64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6,7
OSX x64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
Linux x86 & x64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
FreeBSD i386 & amd64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6

*Linux support refers to Ubuntu, Debian, and CentOS 5

--- The new version differs by 12 commits . - [`2e7f370`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/2e7f37084a1b30e93b142674cfed1fcd05c79e82) 3.13.0 - [`cb8774f`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/cb8774f0ea47fb472625515df04c53ddc9c41623) Merge pull request #1806 from sass/feat/console-log - [`d83ebc8`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/d83ebc8b5de5af389e8a305727b91ebee2b4d669) Use console for logging instead of npmlog - [`79237e6`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/79237e6090f90d9ec0cc6ea026a7d09760b6b415) 3.12.5 - [`16b75d5`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/16b75d5b56c823a8621d155837f2b7cc0a029198) Revert "Send npmlog to stdout" - [`c77632f`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/c77632f0f5c1ae20f3546eaec78c69217c86cfb2) Revert "Always log to stdout" - [`3aadc7d`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/3aadc7d327e62b0ed693e21ac8418d2dff89966c) 3.12.4 - [`fa4515d`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/fa4515d8a1806f18af467bc32fe4277fe719d9f6) Always log to stdout - [`bee91ae`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/bee91ae850d791ad01931a765a309983010de681) 3.12.3 - [`c5a2d38`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/c5a2d38dca5abd98be8adcc96597a15002956774) Merge pull request #1803 from sass/feat/log-to-stdout - [`e7ad0cb`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/e7ad0cb328f8ebf45cc1ba91c56b68d8d53607c6) Send npmlog to stdout - [`e0aef95`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/e0aef95433968ae4b1ea65bd0c2bc233ce8afe57) Fix typo in error handling See the [full diff](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/compare/33fbd2b6e4117df3681037ebf1d400d759221a9c...2e7f37084a1b30e93b142674cfed1fcd05c79e82). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
